name: Cheesy Macaroni and Ham
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Macaroni And Cheese Mix, 7 1/4 Oz
2 Cups Cut-Up Fully Cooked Smoked Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the macaroni and cheese mix according to the package instructions, using margarine and milk.
2. Stir in the ham and chopped green bell pepper.
3. Cook until the mixture is hot.
